# americancloud_block_storage (Resource)

A block storage volume. `size_gb` can be grown in place; volumes cannot be shrunk.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "americancloud_block_storage" "data" {
  name    = "data-volume"
  size_gb = 20
  region  = "us-west-0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Volume name. Changing this forces a new volume.
- `region` (String) Region label, e.g. `us-west-0`. Changing this forces a new volume.
- `size_gb` (Number) Size in GiB (minimum 5). Can be increased in place (grow-only); a decrease is rejected.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the volume was created (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Volume identifier (UUID).
- `status` (String) Current volume status.
